name: core
description: Operating system for building with AI — input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace, session-retrieve, per-profile enforcement, C3c token-compression bundle (RTK native-tool whitelist + MCP output compression), plus opt-in local metric telemetry.

profile.title: Enforcement profile
profile.description: individual = warn-only, telemetry off. project = warn-only, telemetry on (default). company = HARD block on missing depth markers, telemetry on.
